CustomField.description: Field to use for reporting purpose
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(Insolvency_Account__r.Purchase_Date__c)), IF(Insolvency_Account__r.Purchase_Date__c > Payment_Created__c , Insolvency_Account__r.Purchase_Date__c, Payment_Created__c ), Payment_Created__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field to use for reporting purpose
CustomField.label: Payment Reporting Date
